comment: Documents where the node and mif-rs engines are KNOWN to disagree, each tied to the upstream issue that will close the gap. engine-parity.mjs fails on any disagreement not listed here AND on any listed file whose engines now agree (a stale expectation: the upstream fix landed, prune the entry).

disagreements.reason: description frontmatter key dropped by mif-frontmatter jsonld_to_md; node round-trips it losslessly
